name: Agent Guard
description: Runtime-internal tool call governance hook for AI agents. Detects and optionally blocks repetitive loops, prevents resource waste from unbounded agent execution.

capabilities.name: loop_detection
capabilities.description: Detects three types of agent loops: action_loop (same tool+params repeated), output_loop (same tool with different params), error_loop (consecutive failures)

capabilities.name: tool_call_blocking
capabilities.description: Optionally blocks tool execution before it happens via before_tool_call hook. Prevents resource waste from infinite loops.

capabilities.name: action_logging
capabilities.description: Records all tool call events with timestamps, params hashes, and error status for audit and analysis.

endpoints.description: OpenClaw plugin with before_tool_call and after_tool_call hooks
MCP server for loop detection queries (standalone, not embedded)

authentication.description: Plugin runs within agent runtime, no separate auth needed. MCP server currently unauthenticated.

verifiedFailures.title: Governance tool locking itself
verifiedFailures.description: blockOnLoop=true blocked ALL tool calls due to cascading false positives, locking the agent completely
verifiedFailures.lesson: Governance tools themselves need governance. 'No governance →失控' and '有治理但治理失控' are two extremes both needing solutions.
